scripts.test: npm --prefix games/spaceword test && npm --prefix games/keep-white-space test
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix games/spaceword run test:unit && npm --prefix games/keep-white-space run test:unit
scripts.test:functional: npm --prefix games/spaceword run test:functional && npm --prefix games/keep-white-space run test:functional
scripts.lint: npm --prefix games/spaceword run lint && npm --prefix games/keep-white-space run lint && eslint web/**/*.js scripts/**/*.mjs
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix games/spaceword run lint:fix && npm --prefix games/keep-white-space run lint:fix && eslint web/**/*.js scripts/**/*.mjs --fix
scripts.audit: npm --prefix games/spaceword run audit && npm --prefix games/keep-white-space run audit
scripts.ci: npm run check:games && npm test && npm run lint && npm run audit
